017package org.apache.juneau.commons.svl;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
021
022import java.lang.reflect.*;
023import java.util.*;
024
025/**
026 * Reflection-based base class for {@link VarFunction} implementations that prefer typed
027 * argument signatures over manual {@code List<Object>} unpacking.
028 *
029 * <p>
030 * Subclasses declare one or more public {@code invoke(...)} methods whose parameter lists mirror
031 * the function's expected arguments. Per-arg target types and arities are derived once at
032 * construction via reflection; per-call dispatch picks the matching overload by argument count
033 * and runs one reflective invoke + N {@link ArgCoercer} coercions.
034 *
035 * <h5 class='section'>Method-resolution rules:</h5>
036 * <ul>
037 *    <li>The subclass declares one or more public methods named {@code invoke}. Each must have a
038 *       distinct fixed-arity (or be the single variadic overload — see below).
039 *    <li>The return type must be {@code String} (or a subtype convertible via
040 *       {@link Object#toString()}).
041 *    <li>Parameter types may be any of: {@code String}, {@code int}, {@code long}, {@code double},
042 *       {@code boolean} (or their wrappers), {@code String[]}, or {@code Object}. The final slot
043 *       may be {@code String[]} for variadic functions.
044 *    <li>If the subclass needs the {@link VarResolverSession session} (e.g. to look up beans),
045 *       declare {@code VarResolverSession} as the <i>first</i> parameter.
046 *    <li>At most one variadic overload (final {@code String[]} slot) per subclass; combined with
047 *       fixed-arity overloads as long as the arity counts don't overlap.
048 * </ul>
049 *
050 * <h5 class='section'>Example — multi-arity:</h5>
051 * <p class='bjava'>
052 *    <jk>public class</jk> Substring <jk>extends</jk> TypedFunction {
053 *       <ja>@Override</ja> <jk>public</jk> String name() { <jk>return</jk> <js>"substring"</js>; }
054 *       <jk>public</jk> String invoke(String <jv>s</jv>, <jk>int</jk> <jv>start</jv>) { <jk>return</jk> <jv>s</jv>.substring(<jv>start</jv>); }
055 *       <jk>public</jk> String invoke(String <jv>s</jv>, <jk>int</jk> <jv>start</jv>, <jk>int</jk> <jv>end</jv>) { <jk>return</jk> <jv>s</jv>.substring(<jv>start</jv>, <jv>end</jv>); }
056 *    }
057 * </p>
058 */
059@SuppressWarnings({
060   "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for the reflection-driven dispatch.
061})
062public abstract class TypedFunction implements VarFunction {
063
064   /** Per-overload reflection metadata. */
065   private static final class Overload {
066      final Method method;
067      final Class<?>[] argTypes;     // excluding leading session arg if present
068      final boolean takesSession;
069      final boolean variadic;
070      final int fixedCount;          // arg count excluding the variadic slot
071
072      Overload(Method method, Class<?>[] argTypes, boolean takesSession, boolean variadic) {
073         this.method = method;
074         this.argTypes = argTypes;
075         this.takesSession = takesSession;
076         this.variadic = variadic;
077         this.fixedCount = variadic ? argTypes.length - 1 : argTypes.length;
078      }
079
080      boolean acceptsArity(int n) {
081         if (variadic)
082            return n >= fixedCount;
083         return n == fixedCount;
084      }
085   }
086
087   /** All declared {@code invoke} overloads, sorted by descending arity for predictable matching. */
088   private final Overload[] overloads;
089   private final int minArity;
090   private final int maxArity;
091
092   protected TypedFunction() {
093      this.overloads = findInvokeOverloads(getClass());
094      var lo = Integer.MAX_VALUE;
095      var hi = 0;
096      var anyVariadic = false;
097      for (var o : overloads) {
098         if (o.variadic) {
099            anyVariadic = true;
100            lo = Math.min(lo, o.fixedCount);
101         } else {
102            lo = Math.min(lo, o.fixedCount);
103            hi = Math.max(hi, o.fixedCount);
104         }
105      }
106      this.minArity = lo == Integer.MAX_VALUE ? 0 : lo;
107      this.maxArity = anyVariadic ? Integer.MAX_VALUE : hi;
108   }
109
110   @Override
111   public final int minArity() { return minArity; }
112
113   @Override
114   public final int maxArity() { return maxArity; }
115
116   @Override
117   public final String invoke(VarResolverSession session, List<Object> args) {
118      var n = args.size();
119      Overload o = null;
120      for (var c : overloads) {
121         if (c.acceptsArity(n)) { o = c; break; }
122      }
123      if (o == null)
124         throw illegalArg("Function ''{0}'' has no overload accepting {1} argument(s)", name(), n);
125
126      var coerced = ArgCoercer.coerce(name(), o.argTypes, args);
127      try {
128         Object[] effective;
129         if (o.takesSession) {
130            effective = new Object[coerced.length + 1];
131            effective[0] = session;
132            System.arraycopy(coerced, 0, effective, 1, coerced.length);
133         } else {
134            effective = coerced;
135         }
136         var result = o.method.invoke(this, effective);
137         return result == null ? "" : result.toString();
138      } catch (InvocationTargetException e) {
139         var cause = e.getTargetException();
140         if (cause instanceof RuntimeException re)
141            throw re;
142         throw illegalArg("Function ''{0}'' threw {1}: {2}", name(), cns(cause), cause.getMessage());
143      } catch (IllegalAccessException e) {
144         throw illegalArg("Function ''{0}'' invoke method must be public: {1}", name(), e.getMessage());
145      }
146   }
147
148   private static Overload[] findInvokeOverloads(Class<? extends TypedFunction> cls) {
149      var found = new ArrayList<Overload>();
150      for (var m : cls.getMethods()) {
151         if (!"invoke".equals(m.getName())
152            || m.getDeclaringClass() == TypedFunction.class
153            || m.getDeclaringClass() == Object.class
154            || m.getDeclaringClass() == VarFunction.class)
155            continue;
156         var allParams = m.getParameterTypes();
157         var takesSession = allParams.length > 0 && allParams[0] == VarResolverSession.class;
158         var startIdx = takesSession ? 1 : 0;
159         var argTypes = Arrays.copyOfRange(allParams, startIdx, allParams.length);
160         var variadic = argTypes.length > 0 && argTypes[argTypes.length - 1] == String[].class;
161         found.add(new Overload(m, argTypes, takesSession, variadic));
162      }
163      if (found.isEmpty())
164         throw illegalArg("TypedFunction subclass {0} must declare a public invoke(...) method", cls.getName());
165      // Sort by descending fixedCount so larger arity overloads get matched before any
166      // variadic overload they might overlap with.
167      found.sort((a, b) -> Integer.compare(b.fixedCount, a.fixedCount));
168      return found.toArray(new Overload[0]);
169   }
170}
